title: Document Template not moving to Template Center
excerpt:
Hi! 
I’ve moved multiple template boards from the workspace to the Template Center but when I make a document a template, it won’t move into the Template Center. I already have the Template Editor turned on in monday lab…

posts.author: ENies (Emily Nies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I’ve moved multiple template boards from the workspace to the Template Center but when I make a document a template, it won’t move into the Template Center. I already have the Template Editor turned on in monday labs but it won’t move the document. Does anyone know how to save a document as a template and have it move?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have noticed this too! Looks like a good on to post as a feature request!
